title: Vaessen Creative Satin Ribbon, 6mm x 10m, Elegant Sparkle for Creating Cards, Scrapbooks, Gift Wrapping and Other Creative Projects, Purple
features: Double sided satin shine - The ribbon has a shiny and smooth surface on both sides for a professional and symmetrical effect. Soft and silky material that can be used to create different shapes

STUNNING COLOURS - With 24 vibrant colours to choose from, you are sure to find a suitable combination for every project and every season. Attractive primary colors that are perfect for holiday decorations to soft pastel colors for baby showers

PERFECT FOR CRAFTS - The ribbons are very adaptable and can be used in almost any creative project. Use them to make ribbon wreaths and baby toys or to make lace-up cards with a beautiful effect. Scrapbookers can use the ribbon to decorate a book cover, frame an image or as a bookmark. Ribbons are perfect for having them in your craft room

WELL DESIGNED PACKAGING - Sturdy flat round cardboard reel that can be hung or stacked with other colors for easy storage. Special slots on both sides of the spool allow the end of the tape to be placed after use to ensure that the tape can be wound properly and neatly
MEASUREMENTS - Each package contains 1 spool of tape, which measures 6mm wide by 10 meters long. The ribbon is easy to cut with scissors, so it can be cut to the desired length
description: High density ribbon with a shiny, smooth, double-sided surface for an elegant satin luster and a silky soft feel. The stitched edges give the ribbon a clean finish. DIY enthusiasts will enjoy using this beautiful ribbon to decorate scrapbook pages, lace up cards, add them as elegant edges on cakes or to tie gifts and envelopes. This beautiful ribbon is sure to impress! suitable for beginners and experienced people of all ages. The material is flexible and can be used to create many different shapes. The high-quality ribbon comes in a sturdy round spool that can be hung or stacked with other colors for easy storage. To make working with the tape as easy as possible, special slots are placed on either side of the spool to allow the tape ends to be placed after use so that you can keep the material rolled and tidy. the satin ribbon of Vaessen Creative is available in 24 bright colors. Choose your favorite tones from the options above. Attractive colors that would normally be used for Christmas decorations, Father's Day cards or Halloween decorations in softer pastel tones for Easter parties, wedding invitations and newborn gifts. You will surely find a suitable combination for your project! In addition to a 3mm width, the satin ribbon is also available in 2 other widths; 3mm and 9mm. This package contains 1 spool of ribbon size 6mm x 10m.
